metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills

plugins.name: commit-msg
plugins.description: Suggests 3 commit message options based on git diff and project conventions

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude Code skills

plugins.description: Generates SEO metadata (slug, subtitle, tags, SEO title, description) as YAML frontmatter for markdown articles
